Findings.Title: Azure Load Testing resource has no recent test runs
Findings.Detail: No completed test runs in the last 30 days for resource alt-prod.
Findings.Remediation: Re-baseline performance with at least one monthly test run.

Findings.Title: Test run exceeded 5% error threshold
Findings.Detail: Test run 2026-04-15 reported 8.7% HTTP 5xx rate against api.contoso.com.
Findings.Remediation: Investigate API regression introduced in release 1.42.0.

Findings.Title: Load test resource has managed identity
Findings.Detail: System-assigned identity enabled for cross-vnet test scenarios.
